Metadata.title: TEDxBratislava
Metadata.description: TEDxBratislava – an independently organised TED event bringing ideas worth spreading.

Newsletter.title: Be part of the TEDxBratislava community
Newsletter.description: Join people inspired by new perspectives on the world. Our newsletter will bring you news about the upcoming edition, interesting ideas and exclusive invitations.

podcast.title: Podcast
podcast.description: The podcast "Vo svojom živle" covers the biggest and oldest TEDx event in Slovakia – TEDxBratislava. Our aim is to open unusual topics and bring "ideas worth spreading". And since many of them have already been heard on our stage, we decided to return to them regularly and in greater depth. Come and find out in which element our guests feel at home!

hero.title: Help us bring ideas that change things

partner.title: Become a partner
partner.description: Are you interested in supporting us by becoming a partner of TEDxBratislava? Contact us and we will be happy to present all the options for becoming a partner of the TEDxBratislava civic association over a coffee.

volunteer.title: Become a volunteer
volunteer.p1: Volunteering typically involves two to three days — a preparation day before the event, the conference day itself, and occasionally a wrap-up day after the event. Volunteer tasks cover a range of areas: participant registration, catering, technical support, break activities, and speaker escorting.
volunteer.p2: Most tasks are practical and action-oriented — it may not seem like it at first glance, but you definitely won't be bored. A great atmosphere, new people, and the feeling that you were part of something that simply wouldn't have happened without you await you.
